opportunity.title: Reproducible research replay
opportunity.researchGoal: Develop reproducible replay checks for autonomous research factory runs and public evidence packages.
sourceSignals: Improves auditability without requiring network calls.
rationale: Priority score 79 from open-source value, evidence availability, novelty gap strength, feasibility, defensive-publication value, reproducibility, and strategic fit.
Safety risk 15; duplicate risk 0; source weakness 35.
requiredEvidence: Source cards or declared deterministic mock limitations
opportunity.expectedPrototype: A small executable prototype that demonstrates evidence scoring, source-card binding, replay, queue ranking, or prototype validation.
opportunity.expectedTests: Deterministic tests that fail when evidence hashes, queue bindings, or prototype outputs are stale.
limitations: This opportunity is not a legal novelty, patentability, or freedom-to-operate conclusion.
